generated_oml:
instance GantryCranePhysicalEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, AnemometerSensor, CartMotorPositionSensor, HoistMotorPositionSensor, ElectromagnetStatusSensor, ArduinoController
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCranePhysicalEnvironment
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion for gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for crane operation environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures cart motor position for gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist motor position for gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures electromagnet activation status"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement, managed by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement, managed by TMC4671-Eval controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and release"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor and actuator control"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ElectromagnetStatusSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of cart motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GantryLib
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of hoist motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, GantryLib
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Status data of electromagnet (on/off)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ElectromagnetStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of crane movements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane behavior under various conditions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Docker, GantryLib
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) model using Capella/Arcadia for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Docker
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for deploying digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, VisualizationService, ValidationService, FaultDetectionService, SimulationService, LoggingService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane sensor data and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService, ValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for crane state and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane movement using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedTrajectoryPlan
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and validation results via Grafana Dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResults, AlertNotification
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques for maintenance decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationResult
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane behavior for virtual commissioning and testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging of sensor measurements to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingAction
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state and validation results"
]

instance AlertNotification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator notification for threshold breaches in crane parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizedTrajectoryPlan : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized movement trajectories for crane operation based on kinematic models"
]

instance FaultLocalizationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization results for maintenance decisions"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation outcomes used for validation and planning"
]

instance DataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic logging of sensor data for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulation models"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Control Application (e.g., movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) are sent via Python-based Physical Crane Interface to the motors and controllers, enabling precise movement of the cart and hoist."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation performed in real-time. Specific time rates not specified, but the system operates with continuous data streaming from sensors to database and real-time simulation/validation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated system where physical components (crane, sensors, controllers) interact with digital services via MQTT broker and Docker containers. Physical Crane Interface connects to Control Application and Logging Application; digital services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation) use database and dashboard for visualization and validation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all lifecycle stages: as designed (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360), as manufactured (physical hardware), and as operated (real-time data logging and validation during operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs, calculating distance metrics against thresholds; model validity assessed via confidence bounds derived from simulation (e.g., blue and yellow bounds in Grafana)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for inter-service communication; Docker containers connected via a virtual network; data streamed from physical interface to database using TimescaleDB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized services (TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, Grafana) deployed via docker-compose; Python gantrylib module installed via pip on a personal computer; all components run on a single host machine."
]
